style: high-quality fantasy watercolor portrait, hand-painted paper texture, soft painterly edges, semi-realistic, characteristic and imperfect face, neutral expression, chest-up centered composition, consistent camera angle and lighting, no crown, no text, no frame

origins.northern: facial structure inspired broadly by Scandinavian and Northern European populations
origins.eastern-courts: facial structure inspired broadly by East Asian populations
origins.western-marches: facial structure inspired broadly by Native North American populations
origins.steppe: facial structure inspired broadly by sub-Saharan African populations with dark skin
origins.deep-cities: pale European facial structure with cool, underground-city pallor

atlantis.description: subtle magical glow only; optional bright blue, light purple, or grey eyes; optional hairstyle-compatible white hair strand; never add a crown

ageRules.0: baby wrapped in a neutral highborn or lowborn swaddle; no defined hairstyle, clothing style, crown, beard, scar, burn, or blind-eye layer
ageRules.12: recognizable child version of the same identity
ageRules.16: adolescent version of the same identity
ageRules.24: young-adult version of the same identity
ageRules.30: mature adult version of the same identity
ageRules.50: older version of the same identity with believable ageing
